3030000.name: Halmaverse
3030000.description:
Halmaverse is a board game for 2 or 4 players where the goal is to move your pieces to the opposite corner of the board. The player who moves their pieces to the corner first wins the game.

The classic Halma game mode allows pieces to move one step in any direction per turn, or to jump over one or multiple pieces in a row.

In Battle Halma, players can also pick up randomly generated power-ups that allows additional movements and actions.

Choose between 2 types of boards and 5 types of pieces with different materials.
3030000.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
